## 🎬 What cinema knowledge are you contributing?
- [ ] New seed source(s) for the `CINEMA_SEED_SOURCES` whitelist
- [ ] New Topic rule(s)
- [ ] New / updated `DOMAIN_PACK`
- [ ] New `deliverable_type` dimension mapping
- [ ] Other

## 📚 Details
```
# e.g. for a new seed source:
{"domain": "example.org", "category": "学术权威", "trust": 0.9, "session": "fast"}
```

## ✅ Trust & rationale
Why is this source/rule trustworthy and cinema-relevant? (SMPTE-grade standards, official tool docs, peer-reviewed, etc.)

## 🎯 Sub-domain
- [ ] cinema
- [ ] short_video
- [ ] ai_manga_drama
- [ ] all
